notes: 161 St & River Ave (NE corner) to mezzanine to reach 4/B/D service in both directions
alternative_route: All elevators in this station are out of service for replacement. Read on for alternatives: For Manhattan-bound service: Reduced-Fare MetroCard/OMNY holders may ride Metro-north between the nearby Yankees-E 153 St station and Grand Central at no additional charge. You must present your Reduced-Fare MetroCard or Reduced-Fare OMNY card to the conductor to use this service. To access the Yankees-E 153 St station, travel south on River Av to 157 St and proceed west to the station. Take a Grand Central-bound train and transfer at 125 St or Grand Central for onward subway service. For B/D: Proceed east along 161 St to Grand Concourse. Take a Riverdale-bound Bx1 or Kingsbridge Heights-bound Bx2 bus to Tremont Av for B/D service in both directions. For Woodlawn-bound 4 stations: Proceed east along 161 St to Grand Concourse and take a Riverdale-bound Bx1 or a Kingsbridge Heights-bound Bx2. Exit at 170 St for the 170 St 4 station, at Fordham Rd for the Fordham Rd 4 station (Note: all elevators at this station are also out of service for replacement), or at Jerome Av for the Mosholu Pkwy 4 station. Accessible Manhattan-bound 4 service is also available at 170 St and Mosholu Pkwy.

notes: UNLINK...WITHDRAW AND PLACE OUT OF SERVICE duplicate with EQ411330 Complex station.  This is a duplicate of 411330
alternative_route: All elevators in this station are out of service for replacement.  Read on for travel alternatives: For easiest Manhattan-bound service, use nearby Metro-North station. Present Reduced-Fare MetroCard or OMNY card to conductors at Metro-North station Yankees-East 153 St for free out of system transfer. Travel south on River Av to 157 St, walk west on 157 St to the Metro North station. Travel to 125 St or Grand Central and continue your journey.  For Bedford Park Blvd-bound B/D, take a Hunts Pt-bound Bx6 Local bus (161 St and River Av) to Concourse Village E (Morris Av). Transfer to a Kingsbridge-bound Bx32 bus and take it to Jerome Av and Kingsbridge Rd for B or D. For Woodlawn-bound 4, elevators are also out of service at Fordham Rd 4 station. Instead, take a Riverdale-bound Bx1 or Bx1 LTD, or a Kingsbridge-bound Bx2 from Grand Concourse/E 170 St to your destination. You can also transfer to the Bx32, which runs on Jerome Av, at 175 St and Walton Av (just west of Grand Concourse).

alternative_route: If you are on the northbound platform:  Proceed to the ADA boarding area and inform Conductor on a Norwood-205 St bound D  of the need to remain on train at as it changes direction after Norwood-205 St. Ask the  conductor to confirm that the D train will remain in service*. If yes, board the train and  remain on it until it returns to the opposite platform of Bedford Pk Blvd. Then, use  elevator to exit the station. *If the train will not remain in service, please wait for the  next D train and follow the above instructions. Alternatively, you can also contact a  station agent for instructions on how to exit the station.

Or, use elevator to exit the station and take a Mott Haven-bound Bx1, Bx1 LTD, or Bx2  from Grand Concourse/E 170 St to Grand Concourse/E 161 St. Then proceed to the 161  St-Yankee Stadium 4 station at River Ave and E 161 St. If you are on the platform: Take a southbound 4 to 161 St-Yankee Stadium. Then either: Use elevators to transfer to a northbound 4. OR Use elevators to exit the station and take a Riverdale-bound Bx1 or Bx1 LTD, or a  Kingsbridge-bound Bx2 from Grand Concourse/ E 161 St to Grand Concourse/E 170 St.

notes: SW corner of Echo Pl and Grand Concourse providing access to the mezzanine.
alternative_route: If you are on the street: take a Riverdale-bound Bx1 or Kingsbridge Heights-bound Bx2 (Grand Concourse and E Tremont Ave) to Grand Concourse and E Kingsbridge Rd. Proceed to Kingsbridge Rd station.  If you are on the mezzanine: use EL511 to take a Bedford Prk Blvd-bound B or Norwood-205 St-bound D to Kingsbridge Rd. Then, use elevators to exit the station and take a Mott Haven-bound Bx1 or Bx2 (Grand Concourse and E Kingsbridge Rd) to E Tremont Ave.

notes: Mezzanine to Manhattan-bound platform.
alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine: use EL511 and take a Bedford Prk Blvd-bound B or Norwood-205 St-bound D to Kingsbridge Rd. Then, use elevators in the station to transfer to a Manhattan-bound B or D.

notes: Mezzanine to Norwood-205 St-bound platform.
alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine: use EL510 and take a Manhattan-bound B or D train to 161 St-Yankee Stadium. Then, use elevators in the station to transfer to a Bedford Prk Blvd-bound B or Norwood-205 St-bound D.  If you are on the platform: take a Bedford Prk Blvd-bound B or Norwood-205 St-bound D to Kingsbridge Rd. Then, use elevators in the station to transfer to a Manhattan-bound B or D train to Tremont Av.

notes: Street (NW corner of Westchester Av and Lane Av) to mezzanine.
alternative_route: If you are on the street: Proceed north along Westchester Av to Blondel Av. Then, take a Country Club-bound Bx24 bus to Westchester Av and Amendola Plaza for access to Pelham Bay Park 6 Station. If you are on the mezzanine:  Take a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6 to Pelham Bay Park. Then, take a Hutchinson Metro Center-bound Bx24 bus to Westchester Sq-East Tremont Av.

notes: Mezzanine to Pelham Bay Park-bound platform.
alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine: Exit the station and proceed north along Westchester Av to Westchester Av and Blondel Av. Then, take a Country Club-bound Bx24 bus to Westchester Av and Amendola Plaza for access to Pelham Bay Park 6 Station. If you are on the platform:  Take a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6 to Pelham Bay Park. Then, take a Manhattan-bound 6 to Westchester Sq-East Tremont Av.

notes: Mezzanine to Manhattan-bound platform.
alternative_route: If you are on the mezzanine: Take a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6 to Pelham Bay Park. Then, transfer to a Manhattan-bound 6. If you are on the platform:  Take a Manhattan-bound 6 to Hunts Point Av. Then, transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6 to Westchester Sq-East Tremont Av.

notes: SW corner of Southern Blvd and E 149 St for Pelham Bay Park-bound service.
alternative_route: If you are on the street:   Cross E 149 street and take a NY Botanical Garden-bound Bx19 bus to Hunts Point Avenue for access Hunts Point Av station.   If you are on the on the platform:   Take a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6 train to Hunts Point Av station. Then, use elevators to exit the station and take a Riverbank Park-bound Bx19 bus (Southern Blvd & E 163 St) to E 149 St.

notes: NE corner of Southern Blvd and E 149 St for Manhattan-bound service.
alternative_route: If you are on the street:   Take a NY Botanical Garden-bound Bx19 bus to Hunts Point Ave for access Hunts Point Av station and use elevators to access the Manhattan-bound platform.   If you are on the on the platform:   Take a Manhattan-bound 6 train to 125 St. Then, transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6 to Hunts Point Av station. Use elevators to exit the station and take a Riverbank Park-bound Bx19 bus (Southern Blvd & E 163 St) to E 149 St.

notes: Center of Hugh J. Grant Circle to mezzanine and Pelham Bay Park-bound platform.
alternative_route: If you are on the street:  Take a Manhattan-bound 6 to Hunts Point Av and transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6.  If you are on the mezzanine: Take a Manhattan-bound 6 to Hunts Point Av and transfer to a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6.   If you are on the platform: Take a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6 to Westchester Sq – E Tremont Av and transfer to a Manhattan-bound 6 to Parkchester.

notes: Center of Hugh J. Grant Circle to mezzanine and Manhattan-bound platform.
alternative_route: If you are on the street:  Take a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6 to Westchester Sq – E Tremont Av and transfer to a Manhattan-bound 6.  If you are on the mezzanine:  Take a Pelham Bay Park-bound 6 to Westchester Sq – E Tremont Av and transfer to a Manhattan-bound 6.  If you are on the platform: Take a Manhattan-bound 6 to Hunts Point Av and transfer to a Pelham Bay Park or Parkchester-bound 6 to Parkchester.

notes: Street (SE corner of Jerome Av and E Mosholu Pkwy North) to Transfer Mezzanine & Woodlawn-bound Platform
alternative_route: If you are on the street:   Proceed to the SW corner of W Mosholu Pkwy South & Jerome Av. Then either:   Take a Mott Haven-bound Bx1 or Bx2 to Bedford Park Blvd. Take a Manhattan-bound B or D train to 161 St – Yankee Stadium and transfer to 4 service.  Or take a Mott Haven-bound Bx1 or Bx2 to Fordham Rd. Head west along E 188 St and then west along Fordham Rd to the Fordham Rd 4 station for service in both directions.    If you are on the transfer mezzanine level:   Take a Manhattan-bound 4 to Fordham Rd. Exit the station and proceed east along Fordham Rd to the NE corner of Fordham Rd and Grand Concourse. Take a Riverdale-bound Bx1 or Kingsbridge Heights-bound Bx2 to E Mosholu Pkwy South / Jerome Av.   If you are on the Woodlawn-bound platform:  Take a Woodlawn-bound 4 train to Woodlawn. Transfer to a Manhattan-bound 4 train (trains become Manhattan-bound after Woodlawn)

notes: Transfer Mezzanine to Manhattan-bound Platform
alternative_route: If you are on the transfer mezzanine level:  See a station agent for re-entry and take a Woodlawn-bound 4 train to Woodlawn. Transfer to a Manhattan-bound 4 train (trains become Manhattan-bound after Woodlawn).   Or exit the station and proceed to the SW corner of W Mosholu Pkwy South & Jerome Av. Take a Mott Haven-bound Bx1 or Bx2 to Bedford Park Blvd. Take a Manhattan-bound B or D train to 161 St – Yankee Stadium and transfer to 4 service.   If you are on the Manhattan-bound platform:  Take a Manhattan-bound 4 train to Fordham Rd. Transfer to a Woodlawn-bound 4 train to Mosholu Pkwy.
